title: Relicbound
description: Relicbound is a hand-crafted icon set for Minecraft that evokes ancient power and forgotten empires through weathered textures and mystical design.
body:
Relicbound is a custom Minecraft HUD icon set designed to immerse players in a world of ancient magic and long-lost civilizations. Inspired by relics of the past, each icon — from the heartbeat of your health bar to the final breath of your air meter — is crafted with a worn, timeworn aesthetic. Armor glows with the energy of long-dead warriors, and hunger is marked not just by need, but by the gnawing curse of forgotten tombs. Whether you’re diving into ruins or rising as a legend, Relicbound enhances your journey with a mystical, weathered UI that feels pulled from the pages of myth.


Custom Appleskin mod integration! 
it will show a golden/red circle around the hunger sigil.
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4aaf52260e848b935f0b8cefe1beb2a8feaa7a72.gif)

***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
